description_long: This is a rectangular dining table set with a natural wood grain tabletop and four matching chairs. The tabletop is supported by sturdy, black rectangular legs, which are reinforced by a horizontal crossbar for added stability. The chairs feature black frames with ladder-style backrests and flat, square seats, arranged symmetrically around the table. The design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a functional aesthetic suitable for communal dining or meetings. The wood finish on the tabletop contrasts with the matte black of the legs and chairs, creating a visually appealing two-tone effect. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing practicality and contemporary style.
description: A modern rectangular table with a wood grain top and four black ladder-back chairs, arranged for dining or meetings. The set features clean lines and a two-tone wood and black color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop and all four chairs, with two chairs on each long side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the table and the ladder-back design of the chairs, with two chairs on one side and three visible on the far side.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the tabletop and all four chairs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, but from the opposite side, again showing the table's length and chair arrangement.
